variables.notes: No explicit total current assets line is reported on the Balance Sheet preview; this insurer-format statement appears not to present a current/non-current split.

candidates.why: Direct balance-sheet cash line; best match for cash and cash equivalents.

candidates.row_label: Cash and cash equivalents at end of period
candidates.why: Cash flow closing cash balance, but CHE should come from the balance sheet when available.

variables.notes: No explicit total current liabilities line is reported; liabilities are presented in insurance-specific categories rather than a current/non-current subtotal.
No clear short-term debt/current borrowings line is visible on the Balance Sheet preview. Do not infer STD from insurance liabilities or accruals.
No taxes payable/current tax liabilities row is visible on the Balance Sheet preview.

candidates.why: Only explicit PPE balance-sheet line available; closest match to PPE despite being gross rather than net.

candidates.row_label: Property, Plant & Equipment - Accumulated Depreciation & Impairment
candidates.why: Contra-asset component, not the preferred standalone PPE measure.

variables.notes: Selected gross PPE because no net PPE total line is shown; confident this is the best available balance-sheet PPE label.

candidates.why: Direct match for total assets on the balance sheet.
Direct net operating cash flow line; best match for OANCF.

candidates.row_label: Cash Flow from Operating Activities before Changes in Working Capital
candidates.why: Pre-working-capital subtotal, not the final operating cash flow target.
